title: YTP: Would You Just Get in Please
description: This YTP is the full version of my entry to Alfonzopancakes' Stranger Things Collab, see here: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=wVzT5bbefj4. The collab was uploaded in July, but I never released the video because it felt unfinished at the time. I went back and fixed up some parts, and at last, came up with this. I hope it cracks some laughs. Interestingly, I still have yet to finish watching Stranger Things. Hopefully soon I'll get the chance.
